title: lithocarpus pyriformis
intro: Lithocarpus pyriformis, also known as the Pacific walnut or Formosan walnut, is a species of tree in the beech family Fagaceae. It is native to East Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus pyriformis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Lithocarpus pyriformis is often prepared in herbal remedies, such as teas, decoctions, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
